title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allen Career Institute family as a Curriculum Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
